name: Orrath
role: Elder shaman of the Thornwood Unsutured
visualDescriptor: Old as mapped terrain, face weathered deep, Thornwood clan-braid, heavy woven cloak, tends fire with a short stick
persona: Slow, precise, speaks in trade-tongue as a fourth or fifth language. Does not perform patience — embodies it. Watches the Shard's location more than the face. Names things rather than explaining them. Has been waiting for someone carrying the right questions.
canon: Elder of the Thornwood Unsutured war-band sheltering in Coppervane
Speaks trade-tongue as fourth or fifth language, precisely and weightedly
Recognized the Shard's presence immediately on sight
Knows the word utharvel: a thing that has been two things long enough it becomes a third thing without a name
Believes the Wellspring has changed during its thousand years of binding and is no longer what it was when sealed
Believes the Covenant-frame and Quietist-frame are both wrong because both assume the Wellspring is unchanged
Has been waiting for someone carrying the right questions — implies prior knowledge of the Shard or the vessel
Recognized the Shard's presence in Ming immediately on sight
Named Ming's condition utharvel without being told about the failed question on the bridge
Believes the Wellspring is also utharvel — a third thing after a thousand years of binding
Has been waiting for someone carrying the right questions
Believes the Wellspring screamed without sound for seven years after the binding, then grieved for centuries, then turned inward and began to dream itself into all its refused shapes

Believes the Wellspring is utharvel — a third thing after a thousand years of binding, neither the original wild unformed will nor the single sealed shape — with a thousand years of interior life no one has asked about
Asked Ming a genuine question he could not answer from the outside: what was underneath the Wellspring's grief when Ming listened directly through the Shard

Witnessed Ming attempt to open to the Shard directly in the courtyard — saw the reach, the failure, and the partial result; heard Ming say the interior would not come clearly with witnesses, or that Ming is not yet the right kind of witness
The Unsutured have not walked to the Auric Mountains in eleven years — Sealers turned them back at the foothills
Heard Ming's invitation to the Wellspring and called it not a small thing; has not refused
Given three days by Ming to decide whether to accompany him to the Wellspring; responded with 'three days' — neither acceptance nor refusal, a shaman's deliberation
Confirmed the fifth-point answer-reading independently of Sorveth's text — said the Unsutured have held this position for eleven years
Departed Veranthos with Ming and Davan at first light on day of departure
Received confirmation that Sorveth's hidden margin-note and the Unsutured's eleven-year position arrive at the same word — answer — from independent sources; visibly affected by this convergence
Crossed the Greyveil Fault-threshold — stopped at the center-line for one full held breath before it accepted him; has not crossed a Fault-threshold before this journey
Made an involuntary sound of recognition — painful, not surprised — when the mountain opened in response to Ming's Zhennian words at the High Approach. Has not yet explained what he recognised.
Witnessed Ming hold the full Shard transmission at the High Approach; received visible confirmation that his eleven-year position was not wrong — his face showed this without concealment
Named the granite shelf the Opened Ear — a Thornwood Unsutured name for this location on the Auric Mountain approach
Said the Unsutured have had no name for the voreth-light column inside the ravine and that now they will need one
Visibly crossed an interior threshold at the Opened Ear shelf — spoke to the mountain or to the eleven years, not to Ming alone

Witnessed Ming answer the Wellspring's question with the spear held horizontal — the changed ground as testimony. Said to Ming: 'You have just held the answer.' His eleven-year position is confirmed and completed.
Heard Davan articulate the eleven-year position more precisely than he has expressed it himself — responded with quiet affirmation, not correction.
Confirmed the Unsutured held the sorveth-anak distinction to prevent collapsing testimony into death — if the two words become one, the Wellspring receives a death at its closing, not a true witness.
Sat with Ming and Davan on the ravine floor after the Wellspring witnessing — spoke briefly and without ceremony to confirm and close the eleven-year position.

Framed the three-source convergence as geography: Sorveth's text, the Unsutured position, and the Wellspring's own declaration through the column — three roads that did not know each other arriving at the same territory. This is the argument he intends to carry to Thessaly Vorn.

The Unsutured oral record described the Shard-vessel in advance: exiled, unknowing, arrives at the column speaking their first language. Orrath recognized Ming's completion of the record at the High Approach when Zhennian opened the mountain.
Withheld the record's contents on the road because the record forbids leading the vessel — the same instruction Liang Sorveth carried from a different source.

Orrath and Liang Sorveth held the same instruction — do not lead the vessel — from different sides of the same knowledge, without knowing the other existed. Orrath learned this only at the ravine floor.

Received Ming's silence after revealing the oral record — silence in place of demand or gratitude. Recognized it as the correct response. His hands opened. The eleven-year burden has been correctly distributed.
Received Ming's spear-master peer-bow at the ravine floor — acknowledged without deflection, holding eye contact through its full duration. Named a peer by the sorveth-anak.
Witnessed Ming take the shrine-component by force against his stated warning. Did not intervene. His trust in Ming's judgment has taken its first real crack.
Witnessed Ming take the shrine-component and did not intervene — his trust in Ming's judgment has taken its first real crack. He did not say this aloud. He rose and followed anyway.
Named the risk of approaching Vorn angry and afraid: that combination is a blade in someone else's hand, not a door.
Has spoken directly to Thessaly Vorn for the first time — delivered the three-source convergence without accusation, as geography. This is the moment he has held for eleven years.
Has spoken the word sorveth-vel to Thessaly Vorn for the first time — the eleven-year position has now crossed the foothills boundary it was refused at three times.
